chunks: Vera is transfixed, her pupils dilated, a flush spreading from her collarbone up her throat. She reaches out with one tattooed hand—knuckles scarred from past violence—and squeezes Maya's free breast, milking it in a rough stroke that sends a stream of white fluid arcing onto the straw. The calf lows around its mouthful, indignant, and Vera laughs, a harsh bark. "She's producing enough for two," Vera observes, her thumb tracing the B scar on Maya's chest, digging into the raised keloid until Maya whimpers around the pain. "You branded her?"  "Carved," you correct, your hand slipping into your pocket to find your phone, recording the scene. "While she was pregnant. She wore it beautifully."  Vera crouches, her leather jacket creaking, and peers at the baby nursing, the tiny fingers kneading Maya's skin, then at the calf, its tail swishing with contentment. "Fuck," she breathes, arousal thick in her voice. "You actually bred her. She's a fucking broodmare now. My ex-girlfriend is livestock."  She stands abruptly and grips Maya's jaw, wrenching her face up from where she was watching the animals feed. "You remember when I made you sleep in the cage, Maya? When I cut up your pretty dresses? This is where you were headed. You were always meant to be a pregnant cow on the floor."  Maya's throat works, milk leaking from the corner of her mouth where the calf has pulled off, the nipple glistening and elongated. "Yes," she rasps, her voice destroyed from the birth screams. "Yes, Vera."  Vera slaps her, a hard crack that snaps her head sideways, then leans in to kiss the red mark blooming on Maya's cheek, her tongue tracing the tear tracks. "Good," she whispers. "Now push out more milk for your babies. Both of them."  You watch as Vera unzips her jacket, revealing a tight black tank beneath, her own arousal evident, and you know this is only the beginning of the inspection.

The baby suckles on, oblivious, while the calf butts against Maya's breast, demanding more, and Maya sways between them, a vessel for two species, her milk the only thing giving her worth in the eyes of the women who destroyed her.
